title: 人类社交辅助系统流程树
root_goal: 基于用户目标、人物关系、历史事件、行为准则和反馈证据，按照输入接收、标准化转译、解析识别、图谱记忆、上下文编排、目标策略、能力库、反馈更新、思维图谱和心跳调度的明确边界，给出可验证、可回写、可审计的社交辅助建议。

nodes.label: 分层架构
nodes.purpose: 把第一阶段 B2B 商务沟通闭环抽象为可扩展的系统层级，明确输入接收、标准化转译、解析识别、图谱记忆、上下文编排、目标策略、能力库、反馈更新、思维图谱和心跳调度的职责边界。

ContextSnapshot 当前已有文档设计，仍需要上下文编排运行时，把目标、关系快照、相关事件、风险约束、能力上下文和 prompt 组装过程写入审计。
目标状态机、专家模型选择、真实反馈驱动的专家权重校准、能力库 schema、思维图谱 schema 和 heartbeat runtime 仍是后续实现项；规则型专家权重整合已进入 decision-cluster。

代码层仍缺实时 person matching、生产级 ContextSnapshot 编排器、目标状态机和能力库执行注册表；规则型专家并行分析、目标对象四时间窗分析和专家权重整合已接入，后续需要真实反馈校准和更细的模型化权重。
对齐层仍缺实时输入链路、真实图谱回写、专家权重校准和心跳调度行为的对齐回测。

MVP real input trial is now available through npm run mvp:real-trial; the npm script supplies examples/mvp-user-feedback.sample.json so ready-path completion audits include user_test_review, second_pass_optimization and the mvp_user_feedback.v1 report contract. It stops before the MVP loop when PT-003/PT-004 are missing or invalid, and writes a trial artifact after ready materials drive the full loop, report, completion audit and process-tree sync.

MVP real input trial now writes an app-readable mvp_real_input_trial_report.v1 HTML page in both blocked and ready paths, so user testers can inspect missing materials, checks, artifacts and next actions without reading JSON.

MVP status dashboard is now available through npm run mvp:status; it writes JSON, Markdown and HTML summaries that unify self-agent, objective audit, read-only expansion status, read-only duplicate confirmation, read-only manifest readiness, read-only source collection, source intake matrix, real-input trial, process-tree sync, stress and runtime state.

Goal-oriented graph engineering backtest is now available through npm run tupu:backtest; it reads tupu/05, writes goal_oriented_interaction_backtest.v1 under runtime/goal-oriented-backtests/**, refreshes tupu/07 and requires theory_code_match_rate=1 with empty hard_exit_signals.

PT-028 human review decision writer now supports --check-only read-only diagnostics before generating confirmation decisions, emits human_review_sheet_input_missing plus pt028_review_sheet_input_status.v1 for missing requested review files, embeds pt028_human_review_sheet_guidance.v1 and pt028_human_review_evidence_summary.v1 into the fillable JSON sheet, exposes event-stream and feedback-collection summaries in the Markdown/HTML worksheet, and exposes template_initial_diagnostics plus pt028_human_review_fill_plan.v1 for the unfilled sheet so GUI/external operator tools can read target files, row-level fill tasks, command order and prompt-only/no-send boundaries.

issue_register.title: Real-time intimate relationship chat assistance lacks a dedicated scenario, boundary signals and low-latency strategy path
issue_register.evidence: A real-time online chat scenario aiming to develop a respectful romantic relationship exposed gaps in the B2B-first MVP. V1 adds intimate_relationship_reply_playbook.v1 in decision-cluster: confirmed romantic partner identity overrides business templates, candidate relationship probes stay low-commitment, repair and boundary contexts select separate templates, possible_developments/alternative_drafts/confirmation_framework are emitted, and desktop-context-bridge preserves both summary and raw OCR/text content for relationship tone signals. PT-028 initial implementation now adds schemas/romantic-goal-analysis.schema.json and schemas/romantic-expert-sentence-review.schema.json, extends packages/decision-cluster/src/decision-cluster.mjs with romantic_goal_analysis.v1, relationship_gradient_framework.v1, romantic_stage_gradient.v1, semantic feature assessment, psychological_comfort_model.v1, romantic_stage_transition_assessment.v1, dialogue_intent_contract.v1 and romantic_expert_sentence_review.v1 with third-party prompt cards, registers romantic specialists in knowledge/decision-cluster/agent-cluster.json, and covers generic target identity labels, test-fixture isolation, R0-R6/RX stage gates, physical_intimacy_goal_state, context_gap_diagnosis, output_delivery_policy, target-to-user coercion scope, separate user-side manipulation review, target utterance-level expert review and real-send blocking in packages/decision-cluster/tests/decision-cluster.test.mjs. packages/decision-cluster/src/romantic-gui-state.mjs and npm run pt028:gui-state now write pt028_gui_decision_state.v1 with first-person draft, user-visible reasoning log, third-party prompt cards, chain flow and branch records; Sightflow main process exposes zhineng:decision-state:get and ZhinengConsole prefers this runtime state over its local fallback. scripts/audit-pt028-romantic-flow.mjs and npm run pt028:audit now write runtime/pt028-audits/** reports that replay existing read-only records, identify duplicate groups, show output mode/context-gap diagnosis, progression intensity, transition decision and dialogue act, and prove Xiyan remains a fixture-only replay object. Current evidence also adds expert_context_pack.v1, parallel_expert_run_log.v1, romantic_relationship_coordinator_expert.v1, frontend_display_contract.v1 and send_gate_transfer_path.v1 so each specialist receives a readable context bundle, lanes are independently logged, the romantic coordinator synthesizes the final frontend action, the floating dock shows only a short status, the GUI console shows detailed expert/send-gate logs and the send window remains prompt-only while real execution is blocked. The frontend display contract now also defines dock placement_policy, read-only context interfaces, boundary policies and an explicitly authorized controlled-send-preview payload path while default real sending remains blocked. New evidence adds pt028_gui_event_stream.v1, Sightflow zhineng:decision-state:changed push updates with polling fallback, pt028_multi_window_feedback_calibration.v1 dry-run three-window target isolation, explicit at-least-two-unique-target readiness/calibration gates, and pt028_final_special_acceptance.v1 final gate that requires feedback-bound multi-window event stream evidence. Remaining gaps: real operator feedback for every target window and human final special-review approval. New handoff evidence adds pt028_real_feedback_workpack.v1, pt028_candidate_source_lane_summary.v1, pt028_acceptance_closure_plan.v1, pt028_missing_target_collection_plan.v1, pt028_real_observation_gui_states.v1, pt028_final_feedback_decision_pack.v1, npm run pt028:real-observation-gui-states, npm run pt028:feedback-workpack and npm run pt028:feedback-decision-pack so operators can collect real multi-window feedback from a generated worksheet, multi-source candidate observation refs, candidate GUI state paths, missing-target capture tasks, closure actions, candidate-prefilled draft evidence refs and a consolidated confirmation-template/acceptance-chain decision pack without overwriting the real feedback target file or changing confirmation booleans. The final acceptance CLI now derives event stream, feedback readiness and feedback calibration from the explicit --feedback batch, preventing stale latest artifacts from controlling a batch-specific final gate, and writes supporting-artifacts/*.used.json so the exact evidence used by the gate is inspectable.
issue_register.next_action: Run npm run pt028:operator-handoff:refresh for the stable human handoff refresh summary, then open runtime/pt028-operator-handoff-refresh-chains/latest.json and its linked operator handoff HTML/Markdown. If a lower-level manual refresh is needed, run npm run pt028:operator-handoff, npm run pt028:feedback-decision-pack, npm run pt028:feedback-handoff:validate, npm run pt028:feedback-collection:session and npm run pt028:event-stream -- --session=runtime/pt028-feedback-collection-sessions/latest.json. Complete the referenced confirmation decision template after collecting at least two human-reviewed real desktop windows with distinct target_person_id values, then run npm run pt028:feedback-finalize -- --decision=<decision template path>. The finalization runner will rerun coverage and preflight, write the real feedback target only when ready, then run feedback-bound event stream, readiness, calibration and acceptance-chain. If manual fallback is needed, run npm run pt028:feedback-collection:coverage -- --decision=<decision template path>, npm run pt028:feedback-confirm:preflight -- --decision=<decision template path>, npm run pt028:feedback-confirm -- --decision=<decision template path>, npm run pt028:acceptance-chain -- --feedback=runtime/user-inputs/pt028-real-multi-window-operator-feedback.real.json and npm run pt028:audit.

issue_register.evidence: packages/decision-cluster/src/decision-cluster.mjs now emits relationship_gradient_framework.v1 for reusable stage-progressive relationships, romantic_stage_gradient.v1 for R0-R6/RX, romantic_semantic_feature_assessment.v1 for dynamic feature families, psychological_comfort_model.v1 for heat/comfort/intensity, romantic_stage_transition_assessment.v1 for next-stage readiness, dialogue_intent_contract.v1 for first-person drafts and third_party_target_reply_prompt.v1 when active input is blocked. packages/decision-cluster/tests/decision-cluster.test.mjs asserts default confirmed-romantic drafts use micro progression instead of direct hand-holding, keeps higher-heat closeness as an alternative, and verifies third-party prompt cards and expert gradient advice.

issue_register.title: Local information acquisition ports for WeChat, web pages and chat tools are not designed as a unified intake layer
issue_register.evidence: Current MVP accepts PilotImportBatch, platform snapshots and manual records. PT-029 now has docs/16 as the implementation entry, packages/tool-runtime for dry-run tool capability planning, tool_intake_bridge.v1 tool-to-intake/send bridging, and packages/intake-runtime for reusable IntakeObservation normalization, adapter capability registration, source_adapter_init_kit.v1 future-source onboarding templates, source_adapter_conformance.v1 future-source checks, RawEvent mapping, controlled SendCommand/SendResult dry-run validation, controlled_send_material_kit.v1 operator material kits, controlled_send_real_window_readiness.v1 real-window readiness aggregation, controlled_send_command_preflight.v1 real-window command material checks, desktop_controlled_send_completion.v1 post-send verification, desktop_controlled_send_handoff.v1 operator handoff reporting, intake_implementation_audit.v1 implementation readiness evidence, and docs16_implementation_status.v1 goal status evidence. Sightflow, browser and fake sample observations all normalize to auditable RawEvent records before ContextSnapshot assembly; browser now has both an observation sample and SourceAdapterCapability sample validated through npm run intake:adapter:validate:browser. scripts/bridge-tool-intake.mjs writes runtime/tool-intake-bridges/** from CLI-Anything tools without executing external commands; send-capable tools only produce blocked OutboundSendCommand templates and dry-run SendResult evidence. scripts/init-source-adapter-kit.mjs writes runtime/source-adapter-kits/** with safe capability/observation templates and the next conformance command, so future software can start from the same gate instead of editing the intake workflow. Sightflow now has a zhineng_bridge session, desktop observation client, controlled DesktopSendExecutor, runtimeMode wiring and Electron CLI atom tests for bridge observation, send dry-run, fake-device controlled send and real test-window controlled-send runner gates. Trigger-engine now builds default-blocked OutboundSendCommand objects from TriggerPlan/AutomationPreview message_draft and validates them through intake-runtime dry-run. npm run tool:intake:bridge bridges selected CLI-Anything tools into intake/send templates; npm run intake:adapter:init generates source adapter onboarding templates; npm run intake:adapter:validate proves adapter capability and observation samples can share the RawEvent path before future sources are added. npm run desktop:send:materials:init writes runtime/controlled-send-material-kits/** with package-local templates, runtime/user-inputs/templates safety templates, operator checklist, readiness refresh commands and next validation commands without sending. npm run desktop:send:readiness writes runtime/controlled-send-real-window-readiness/** with material kit, command file, box regions, preflight, prepare, handoff, completion, audit, blockers and next commands without sending. npm run desktop:send:command:check writes runtime/desktop-controlled-send-command-preflights/** with command placeholders, test-window scope, confirmation gates, target checks, permissions and box-region readiness without sending. npm run desktop:send:prepare-controlled writes controlled-send readiness evidence plus safe SendCommand, box-region templates and handoff commands without sending; --require-box-regions can make local box selection a hard gate. Sightflow dev:test-controlled-send-real checks readiness schema, ready gate, empty required failures, real_send_attempted=false, command path, readiness path, result path, optional box-regions path, target binding, thread hint, draft length and message_draft_sha256 against the prepared trial handoff/snapshot before any real send. npm run desktop:send:complete-controlled reads the real runner result, verifies command_summary target binding, draft length and message_draft_sha256 against the prepared trial snapshot, rejects command changes after prepare and writes audit/feedback-ready completion evidence without sending. npm run desktop:send:handoff writes runtime/desktop-controlled-send-handoffs/** with latest material kit, command preflight, readiness, tool bridge, completion, audit status, operator commands and structured operator_next_actions without sending. npm run desktop:intake:audit checks the automated docs/16 implementation evidence and keeps real_send_verified=false until a real test-window completion exists. npm run desktop:intake:docs16-status writes runtime/docs16-implementation-status/** and keeps goal_complete=false until the real controlled-send completion target binding and refreshed intake audit evidence are both verified. npm run typecheck, npm run dev:test-bridge-observation, npm run dev:test-send-dry-run and ALLOW_CONTROLLED_SEND=true npm run dev:test-controlled-send pass; dev:test-controlled-send-real now fails closed without ALLOW_REAL_CONTROLLED_SEND=true. dev:test-real-intake-observation adds a real WeChat read-only intake trial that writes runtime/desktop-inbox-real/** artifacts and keeps real_execution_allowed=false; npm run desktop:inbox:real:ingest ingests the latest real read-only Observation through identity resolution and storage-runtime, preserves send blocking, writes desktop_real_intake_ingestion.v1 evidence and keeps unsafe identity auto-merge disabled.
issue_register.next_action: Run a real test-account or real test-window controlled send trial. Keep real execution blocked until user confirmation, connector authorization, target verification and audit evidence are complete.

issue_register.title: Specialist agent selection and scenario-specific expert roles are not explicit
issue_register.evidence: knowledge/decision-cluster/agent-cluster.json now defines B2B/desktop specialist experts and PT-028 romantic specialists; packages/decision-cluster/src/decision-cluster.mjs builds parallel_expert_analysis.v1 with rule-based expert selection from goal, channel, desktop send, identity gate, risk, culture, evidence and intimacy signals, and builds target_context_windows plus expert_independent_context_analysis.v1 / expert_weight_integration.v1 before final weights. packages/decision-cluster/tests/decision-cluster.test.mjs covers a desktop WeChat scenario where unresolved identity selects sales, compliance, desktop send safety and identity experts, covers target-person temporal-window expert weight revision, and covers PT-028 generic target sentence review with optional identity labels. ExpertContextPack and parallel_expert_run_log now make the specialist context assembly and lane-level proof explicit for later true parallel execution.
issue_register.next_action: Use real feedback and future production ContextSnapshot orchestration to calibrate expert weights; keep expert recommendations explainable and human-confirmed.

issue_register.title: Proactive process scheduling lacks real-world cadence, culture context, second interaction, invitation and meeting strategy loops
issue_register.evidence: Trigger engine supports user-initiated, scheduled, profession routine, preference routine and graph-signal triggers, but there is no scenario process tree for romantic development, sales, after-sales or customer reception that decides when to re-engage, cool down, invite, prepare for a meeting, debrief after a meeting and stop based on feedback. docs/09 now defines TimingDecision and InteractionProcessPlan as the required timing layer.
issue_register.next_action: Define scenario playbooks for intimacy, sales, after-sales and reception on top of TimingDecision: timing windows, cultural/context notes, active outreach rules, invitation strategy, meeting prep prompts, post-action feedback, stop/adjust thresholds and writeback mappings.
